title: ochyrorchis mairei
intro: Ochyrorchis mairei, also known as Oxyrorchis mairei or a synonym of  Orchis mairei, is a rare, terrestrial orchid species native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ochyrorchis mairei are said to include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
